line_ref: Example beat — two-scene cut, fast + punchy (5s clips). SCENE 1 is silent (script_line empty — a human scores it separately); only the SCENE 2 punchline carries VO. Documents the generic silent-first-clip / VO-on-the-punchline pattern. All copy, ids, and paths below are neutral placeholders.

clips.animation_direction: The character is absorbed in a small task, calm and focused. Then a brief reaction: a genuine, pleased little moment. Natural, believable motion, steady framing, even lighting.
The character gives a small confident nod and a brief knowing look toward camera. Smooth continuous motion, steady camera, even lighting.
clips.script_line: Here's an example punchline for the second clip.
